stemHtml: Compared to a more forward CG, moving the CG aft will result in the following consequences on fuselage and directional stability…

options.a: Fuselage instability increases and directional stability decreases.
options.b: Fuselage stability increases and directional stability decreases.
options.c: Fuselage instability increases and directional stability increases.
options.d: Fuselage stability increases and directional stability increases.
